publication_goal.framing: v10-only (Branch B-Both retired 2026-05-23 post CAFM-EqM FID 341.25 catastrophe). v10 = PGD hard-example mining on EqM regression target. Method claim: first adversarial-style training for regression-target gen models without a discriminator (mining-based, single-objective, cannot collapse). Lin lab AFM/CAFM/AAPT/V-PAE own discriminator-based niche; v10 owns mining-based niche.
publication_goal.primary_prior: Lin et al. 2026 AFM (arxiv 2511.22475, ICML 2026) + CAFM (arxiv 2604.11521). Code: github.com/ByteDance-Seed/Adversarial-Flow-Models (MIT).
publication_goal.sharpened_claim: First adaptive hard-negative mining for regression-target generative models. PGD-mined hard examples compose with CAFM-style discriminator post-training to compound FID gains on EqM. (per VeCoR future-work cite; differentiated from DAT, CAFM, ACT, AEBM-Diff, Rob-GAN.)
contributions: First port of CAFM-style adversarial AT to EqM family
First combination of PGD-input-mining with GAN-discriminator AT on regression-target flow models
SiT head-to-head confirmation that combination generalizes

events.detail: Project created.
Vanilla EqM-B/2 80-epoch (1 seed, IN-100) FID 121.24.
DG-ANM EqM-B/2 80-epoch (1 seed, IN-100) FID 112.58. Later invalidated by 3-seed CIFAR seed study.
diag_dganm_signal.py: ||field|| ~47 at mined negatives, margin=5 gives zero gradient. DG-ANM hinge is inert at any realistic margin.
CIFAR 3v3 seed study: DG-ANM e100 30% FID-worse than vanilla, 27x variance.
DG-ANM v01 CIFAR 150ep 3-seed 10K FID 21.66 +- 9.95 vs vanilla 12.54 +- 1.15. Confirms v01 formulation is broken.

Abandoned HP tuning. Autoresearch restructured around code variants informed by literature review (VeCoR 2025, Du 2021 CD, Luo 2023 DCD, Pidstrigach 2022, Kim 2024 CTM). Variant slate v00..v06 in experiments/dganm_variants/. Old HP history archived to results_hp_archive.tsv.

Reconciled 3-week-stale pipeline state vs sacct. Stage A gate PASSED for v02 (gap 2.10 FID). Stage B vanilla IN-1K baseline trusted (FID 31.41). v02 IN-1K 80ep cancelled 2x. v10 hard-example proposal drafted (e36ca0f) as Stage B pivot.

15-week summer plan locked. Broad framing. Targets: NeurIPS 2026 workshop (Aug 29) + ICLR 2027 (~Oct 1). NeurIPS 2026 main missed. Differentiation locked vs DAT (Wu 2025) and AEBM-Diff (Geng 2024). 2400 GPU-h budget.
Phase 0 spec written to documentation/phase-0-spec.md. Five tasks with pre-registered gates. Project scope locked to diff-EqM only in CLAUDE.md.

Phase 0 extended 7->14 days. Lit-review tasks 0.A.1/0.A.2/0.A.3 + 0.B synthesis-apply lead the phase. ~18 papers across 5 buckets. SYNTHESIS.md feeds v10 mechanism design, v11 fallback, framing. CLAUDE.md adds literature review protocol.

Branch B-Both locked. Lin et al. AFM/CAFM identified as dominant prior. Combine v10 PGD with CAFM discriminator AT on EqM (Phases 1-4) + SiT head-to-head Phase 5. Repo github.com/ByteDance-Seed/Adversarial-Flow-Models cloned for adaptation. Compute budget revised to ~2600 GPU-h (15% over 2400).

17 papers read, SYNTHESIS.md written. Positioning sharpened: 'first adaptive hard-negative mining for regression-target generative models' per VeCoR future-work cite. Mechanism threat from Briglia (invariance fails diffusion AT) flagged; v10-equivariant fallback ready. CAFM-EqM port design + v10+CAFM combination design + v11 fallback all locked. EqM confirmed latent-space (SD VAE 4x32x32) - CAFM port directly compatible. Lin repo cloned (MIT). SSH locked - v02 postmortem deferred.
Phase 1a Day-1+2 code complete: foundational helpers (5 modules), train scaffold, configs, sbatch, CIFAR variant. All local smoke tests + 14-unit-test suite PASS. Cluster work pending SSH refresh.
Cluster SSH restored. v02 postmortem complete (cosine saturation mechanism failure, not OOM/timeout). Submitted: v10 CIFAR sanity (13848000) + CAFM-EqM 500-step smoke (13848066).

All Phase 1a code + gate evaluators + Phase 5 prep + paper draft intro committed. Cluster jobs running: v10 CIFAR sanity (13848332 RUNNING on seas_gpu) + CAFM-EqM smoke (13848066 pending gpu_test ETA 14:13).

v10 CIFAR sanity COMPLETED: final FID 13.40 (5K samples) vs v00 R4 vanilla 14.17 (beats by 0.77 FID). Mechanism gates A/B/D/F PASS; ratio stable (non-saturating, the central differentiation from v02). PI update trigger: Phase 0.3 PASS at proxy-scale.

CAFM-EqM smoke v11 (14104174) COMPLETED exit 0 in 28min on gpu_test (batch=4). Dis loss 2.0->0.15, gen loss 3.94 finite, ckpts persisted. Port validates end-to-end after 11 fix iterations. Unblocks Phase 1b.
Phase 1b CAFM-only IN-1K-256 EqM-B/2 10ep post-training submitted: job 14207013 on seas_gpu, ENABLE_V10=0, seed 0, SHA 53bc963. Gate: FID <= 30.41.

Phase 1b CAFM-only IN-1K-256 EqM-B/2 10ep COMPLETED exit 0 in 17:50:12 on holygpu8a16304. 50K steps. Gen loss converged 4.0->1.7-2.3; dis loss healthy 0.9-2.1 oscillating. FID eval submitted as 14957638.
Phase 1b 50K-sample FID = 341.25 vs vanilla 31.41 (10x worse). Phase 1 gate FAIL. Not retunable.

Diagnostic at ckpt_5000 = FID 369 confirms instant collapse (post-warmup). Vanilla 10K = 37.09 (noise floor consistent). Mechanism bug: freshly-init dis finds trivial shortcut against regression-trained gen; gen pushed away from EqM target manifold by adversarial signal. Postmortem documentation/postmortem-cafm-eqm-2026-05-23.md. CLAUDE.md updated: mandatory smoke-time sample probe + discriminator-loss oscillation check. Pivot proposed: v10-only branch (Phase 0.3 PASS evidence intact). needs_user_input set; awaiting confirm.

Audit caught: (1) gen/dis never DDP-wrapped (4 ranks trained independently); (2) cluster home repo dir stale so sbatch directives ignored. Fixes: manual all_reduce + init broadcast + rsync slurm/ before submit. Smoke v11 (no collectives), v12/v13 (NCCL on MIG) consumed, v14 PASS on real A100. Phase 1b resubmitted 14509440 SHA 375ab56.

Smoke-probe FID (10K samples) at ckpt_65000 (~13ep) = 78.91. Healthy trajectory; vanilla 76ep = 37.09; catastrophic threshold > 200 (CAFM Phase 1b ckpt_5000 was 369). v10 mechanism transferring at IN-1K scale; aux/base ratio 1.006-1.022 matches CIFAR Phase 0.3 PASS 1.047-1.049 signature.

Quota alert (90/100GB) hit twice in 12h from ckpt_every=5000 backlog. Manual prune freed 77G (89->12G). Auto-pruner sbatch (prune_v10_ckpts.sbatch) deployed as job 15933157 on shared partition; watches main job 15638767, keeps anchors {5000, 65000} + latest 2, exits on main completion. Prevents recurrence of 15290932 quota-wedge.

Pre-staged submit_v10_phase1_fid.sh (50K-sample Phase 1 gate FID, auto-resolves latest ckpt) and submit_v10_phase2_seeds.sh (seeds 1+2 80ep train for Phase 2 Welch t test). One-shot launch on train completion / gate pass.

v10 IN-1K seed-0 50K-sample FID = 29.0085 vs vanilla 31.41 (2.40 FID gain, 7.6% relative). Phase 1 gate cleared by 1.40 FID. Mechanism CONFIRMED at paper-comparable scale (B/2, 80ep). Phase 2 multi-seed launched: 16362498 (seed 1) + 16362499 (seed 2) on gpu partition. PI update triggered. Workshop paper §4 has its first headline number.

Weekly arxiv sweep. New MEDIUM hit: AFM (Lin Nov 2025, arxiv:2511.22475, IN-256 XL/2 FID 2.38 one-step adversarial flow). Per-paper note literature/lin2025_afm.md. Lin lab now 4 papers in 12mo, owns discriminator-based niche. v10 mining-based niche still uncontested. Framing implication: workshop §1 frames v10 as methodological (first discriminator-free adversarial-style regression-target training), NOT FID-SOTA contender.

v10 B/2 seed1 (16376973), seed2 (16376974), lambda03 (16376975), vanilla L/2 (16406011) all FAILED ~40h on home-quota deadlock (40h<48h cap, so quota not timeout). Ckpts survived. Resumed from latest: seed1@235K->17083306, seed2@220K->17083307, lam03@355K->17083309, L2@55K->17083311. Aggressive prune to latest-2/dir freed 28G (82->54G). Root cause persists: 7 parallel trains write 5K-step ckpts faster than pruner clears; needs sbatch sync keep-latest-1 patch (deferred, in-flight jobs old code).

ANM field-robustness mechanism confirmed at IN-1K B/2 (5120 latents, jobs 17788287+17788329). ANM lower MSE/higher cosine all radii SIG; gap widens off-traj; largest at real v10-mined perturbation (dMSE -0.0368 [CI -0.0396,-0.0340]). Norm-reshaping ruled out; peaks mid-t.
